title: Arrays, Dynamic Sequences, and Locality · Invariant Triage
summary: Design an event buffer with predictable indexing, insertion, and memory behavior. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an array-backed sequence with operation traces and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain indexing and cache-local traversal from contiguous logical storage.
Trace capacity growth and amortized append behavior through resize events.
Compare indexed access, search, middle insertion, deletion, slicing, and copying costs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
